news.summary: Laser Photonics Corporation (NASDAQ: LASE) and subsidiary Control Micro Systems, Inc. have revealed a notable ramp-up in their collaborative Research and Development project concentrating on Laser Cold Marking technology for plastic medical device manufacturing. This initiative targets the precision needs of this industry.
news.headline: Laser Photonics Corp and CMS Laser boost R&D for Laser Cold Marking in medical device manufacturing, aiming for enhanced technology.

news.summary: A former Chief Marketing Officer at Samsung, Marc Mathieu, who was a leader in artificial intelligence at Salesforce, has recently taken on a new role at Venn in New York. Venn aims to revolutionize the multifamily real estate sector using advanced technology. Mathieu will play a key role in developing and implementing artificial intelligence strategies to enhance Venn's operations. This move signifies a significant development in the industry, with Mathieu bringing his expertise to a company that is focused on integrating intelligent tech into the real estate market.
news.headline: Marc Mathieu, ex-Samsung CMO and Salesforce AI SVP, joins Venn to lead AI transformation in multifamily.

news.summary: In New York, Pangram, a leading AI text detection tool, has introduced a new model that boasts heightened accuracy levels, surpassing even the latest models such as those from OpenAI. This cutting-edge detector of AI-generated text is recognized for its precision and reliability in the field.
news.headline: Pangram releases new AI writing detection model, the most accurate on new models like OpenAI's.

news.summary: A technology company based in Menlo Park, California has introduced the DeltaStream Fusion Unified Analytics Platform, which allows organizations to efficiently handle both real-time and historical data within a single platform. This innovation aims to streamline data processing for businesses, offering a comprehensive solution for data analysis.
news.headline: DeltaStream unveils Fusion, the first unified analytics platform for real-time and historical data processing - consolidating data operations for organizations.

news.summary: Mathias Höglund, Kalmar’s SVP of Human Resources and member of the leadership team, is leaving the company as of April 8th, 2025. The company commends his role in strengthening HR processes, especially during the transition to an independent company. Kalmar is set to begin the recruitment process for a new SVP of Human Resources immediately. Internal arrangements are in place to ensure a smooth interim period. Kalmar operates globally in over 120 countries and has around 5,200 employees. In 2024, the company's sales reached approximately EUR 1.7 billion. For more information, contact Carina Geber-Teir at Kalmar.
news.headline: Kalmar's SVP, HR, Mathias Höglund leaving company. New recruitment process for replacement initiated. Company operates in 120+ countries, with 5,200 employees and sales of EUR 1.7 billion in 2024.

news.summary: In South Korea, Magnachip Semiconductor Corporation (NYSE: MX) has revealed its decision to close down its Display business by the end of Q2 2025 after a comprehensive review. The Board of Directors has unanimously approved this plan following the Company's previous announcement to evaluate all strategic possibilities for the Display business. The Display business will be categorized as discontinued operations starting from the release of Q1 results.
news.headline: Magnachip to close Display business by end of Q2 2025. Board unanimously approves shutdown plan.

news.summary: In San Francisco, Envoy, a workplace platform, has introduced a revamped analytics experience called Actionable Analytics. This launch comprises newly designed dashboards featuring interactive data visualizations centered on metrics like occupancy, attendance, desks, rooms, visitors, and workplace deliveries. Actionable Analytics provides companies with intuitive filters and custom reporting options to enable them to make data-driven decisions.
news.headline: Envoy unveils Actionable Analytics feature to track occupancy, attendance, desks, rooms, and visitors for informed decision-making.

news.summary: An alliance has been formed between ACI Worldwide, a pioneer in global payment technology, and NationsBenefits, a prominent healthcare fintech and supplemental benefits platform. The collaboration aims to boost retailer integration, diversify payment methods, and enhance security for merchants who accept the NationsBenefits Benefits Mastercard® Prepaid Flex Card. This prepaid card offers members convenient access to various benefits.
news.headline: ACI Worldwide & NationsBenefits team up to boost health & retail benefits for consumers with Flex Card. #Partnership #ACIWorldwide #NationsBenefits

news.summary: Jonathan Rende, a seasoned technology professional, has been named as the new Chief Product Officer (CPO) at Checkmarx in Paramus, N.J. Rende will assume the role immediately at the forefront of the cloud-native application security leader.
news.headline: Jonathan Rende named Chief Product Officer at Checkmarx in Paramus, N.J. leading in cloud-native security.

news.summary: In Houston, SynergenX is raising awareness during Stress Awareness Month in April about the detrimental effects of chronic stress on health, particularly hormone balance. The company highlights the link between prolonged stress and hormone imbalance, emphasizing the significance of recognizing this connection. To aid individuals in assessing if stress is impacting their hormonal health, SynergenX provides a convenient self-evaluation tool. Excessive stress leads to the overproduction of hormones, indicating the crucial need to address stress levels for overall well-being.
news.headline: Chronic stress can lead to hormone imbalance, impacting health. SynergenX offers self-assessment tool during Stress Awareness Month.

news.summary: A digital health company based in Peachtree Corners, Georgia, known as Sanguina, has unveiled Ruby, marking a significant rebrand and extension of its AnemoCheck Mobile app. The updated app incorporates the company's patented fingernail selfie method for tracking blood health and introduces additional functionalities such as circulation assessment, wellness monitoring, and customized health tips. Ruby goes beyond the app's initial emphasis on managing anemia. It integrates the same patented technology for enhanced user experience.
news.headline: Sanguina launches Ruby, an evolution of AnemoCheck Mobile, with features like circulation analysis and wellness tracking.

news.summary: In Bentonville, Arkansas, Walmart+ is marking its success as a top membership in retail by hosting Walmart+ Week from April 28 to May 4. The exclusive event, dedicated to both current and new members, offers special rewards and deals to enhance the existing benefits. Members will enjoy perks such as 50 cents off per gallon of fuel at select Exxon™ and Mobil™ stations nationwide during this week-long celebration.
news.headline: Walmart+ Week offers exclusive savings for members from April 28 to May 4, including 50¢ off per gallon of fuel.

news.summary: In Deerfield, Illinois, Walgreens Boots Alliance, Inc. disclosed its financial outcomes for the second quarter of fiscal 2025, concluding on February 28, 2025. The CEO, Tim Wentworth, highlighted that the results for the quarter demonstrated effective cost control and enhancements in U.S. Healthcare. However, this progress was somewhat counterbalanced by poorer front-end outcomes in U.S. Retail Pharmacy. The company also faced significant legal settlements that led to persistent negative free cash flow.
news.headline: Walgreens Boots Alliance reports Q2 fiscal 2025 results: CEO cites cost management, improvement in US Healthcare, and negative free cash flow due to legal settlements.

news.summary: In San Diego, WD-40 Company (NASDAQ:WDFC) announced their financial results for the second fiscal quarter ending on February 28, 2025. The company focuses on creating solutions for workshops, factories, and homes globally. Total net sales for the quarter reached $146.1 million, marking a 5% growth from the previous year's fiscal quarter. This indicates a steady increase in the company's sales performance.
news.headline: WD-40 Company's Q2 2025: Net sales $146.1 million, up 5% from prior year. Creating solutions in workshops, factories, homes.

news.summary: Salt Lake City — Recently, 50 grocery suppliers are preparing to join ReposiTrak for its cutting-edge traceability solutions, all before regulatory deadlines. This move comes as ReposiTrak offers hardware-free solutions to facilitate compliance with regulations within the industry.
news.headline: ReposiTrak adds 50 new grocery suppliers to traceability network, expanding rapidly.

news.summary: Dublin - The report titled "Supply Chain Security Market" states that the market is expected to witness substantial growth from USD 2.52 billion in 2024 to USD 5.14 billion by 2030. This significant increase is attributed to the adoption of various hardware components such as IoT sensors, RFID tags & readers, GPS trackers, and software solutions including risk management, threat intelligence, and blockchain-based solutions. In terms of security types, the market emphasizes data locality & protection and fraud prevention. This report is now available on ResearchAndMarkets.com for interested parties.
news.headline: Global supply chain security market expected to grow to $5.14 Billion by 2030 with rising demand for IoT sensors, RFID tags, GPS trackers, risk management, threat intelligence, and blockchain solutions.

news.summary: WOBURN, Massachusetts - SES AI Corporation, a prominent player in AI-enhanced high-performance Li-Metal and Li-ion batteries, disclosed its preliminary unaudited revenue figures and anticipated liquidity for the quarter concluded on March 31, 2025. Aligning with the earlier provided full-year 2025 projections, the company anticipates first-quarter revenue falling between $5.0 million and $5.8 million. Further updates on the company's financial performance are expected to be announced soon.
news.headline: SES AI reports preliminary Q1 2025 revenue between $5.0M to $5.8M. Conference call announced for results.

news.summary: In the first quarter of 2025, Kits Eyecare Ltd. recorded significant financial growth with their total revenue surging by 34% year-over-year to around $46.6 million. The company also achieved a record high in adjusted EBITDA, surpassing 7.0% of revenue. Kits Eyecare's cash reserves remained robust, exceeding $17.5 million. The company, based in Vancouver, BC, aims to release the complete financial results for Q1 2025 in early May 2025, with further details about the conference call expected to be provided in April.
news.headline: KITS Eyecare reports Q1 2025 revenue of $46.6 million (up 34% YOY), with over $17.5 million in cash and 7.0% EBITDA.

news.summary: New U.S. tariffs could lead to an up to 11% increase in the cost of laptops, smartphones, and other electronics. Consumers are adjusting by seeking discounts, comparing prices, and timing purchases during sales events. A report surveyed over 1,000 shoppers in the U.S. and U.K., highlighting that 53% plan to buy electronics during major sales events, while 44% compare prices across at least three retailers. Mobile shopping is popular, with 59% using smartphones for purchases. 54% of consumers shop across multiple marketplaces, emphasizing the need for price consistency and optimized content for brands. The full story is available on Benzinga.com.
news.headline: New U.S. tariffs could increase electronics prices by up to 11%. 53% of shoppers wait for sales, 44% compare prices across 3 retailers, and 59% shop via smartphone. Brands must adapt to changing purchasing habits.

news.summary: The introduction of new Current Procedural Terminology (CPT) codes represents a significant advancement in bringing Caristo's CaRi-Heart® to mainstream clinical practice. CaRi-Heart®, an innovative AI-driven solution, can identify coronary inflammation from standard CT scans. This technology revolutionizes cardiac risk evaluation by shifting focus from anatomy to biological markers. The inclusion of these new codes paves the way for wider access to Caristo's groundbreaking tool, redefining the landscape of cardiac care.
news.headline: AMA approves CPT codes for Caristo's AI-powered heart disease risk technology, CaRi-Heart®, for routine CT scans.

news.summary: In Tel Aviv, Israel, on April 8, 2025, LEVnARO Jewelry, a prominent player in the luxury diamond jewelry sector, has achieved a funding milestone of $650,000. The funding was secured with the backing of notable tech figures like Gad Maor, Adam Rakib, and serial tech entrepreneur Rafael Maor.
news.headline: LEVnARO Jewelry raised $650,000 in funding to expand its premium diamond jewelry brand, with support from tech entrepreneurs.

news.summary: Motivity, a prominent provider of clinical SaaS solutions for Applied Behavior Analysis (ABA) providers, revealed on April 8, 2025, its latest development - the extension of the Motivity platform to encompass a comprehensive all-in-one practice management system tailored for enterprises. This move signifies the company's commitment to enhancing its services for ABA providers.
news.headline: Motivity expands into practice management with all-in-one ABA solution. Offers enterprise-ready system for ABA providers.

news.summary: Garmin, a prominent fitness technology company and creator of the first running smartwatch, recently revealed details about the Garmin Marathon event set to take place in Olathe, Kansas on April 8, 2025. The event promises a distinctive experience featuring four different race distances, along with an expo and finish line festival. This marathon is expected to attract a significant number of participants and spectators.
news.headline: Garmin will host signature Marathon Series with four race distances, expo, and finish line festival.

news.summary: Grain Ecosystem, a digital platform facilitating waste-to-value projects through a trusted partner network and modern technology, has secured significant backing from Elevate Ventures, SNØCAP, SE Ventures, Helidoni Ventures, and prominent cleantech operators. The venture, announced in Boston on April 8, 2025, marks a substantial investment in sustainable innovation.
news.headline: Grain Ecosystem receives strategic investment for growth from Elevate Ventures, SNØCAP, SE Ventures, Helidoni Ventures.

news.summary: FDA's decision permits the unrestricted distribution of EGRIFTA SV ®, eliminating ambiguity regarding all produced batches.
news.headline: FDA approves Prior Approval Supplement for EGRIFTA SV®, allowing unrestricted distribution, certainty for all batches.

news.summary: EnviroGold Global is shielded from the current U.S. government tariffs and benefits from the stronger U.S. Dollar.
news.headline: EnviroGold Global stays strong amidst U.S. tariffs, benefits from stronger dollar for growth.

news.summary: In Montreal on April 08, 2025, Aya Gold & Silver Inc. (TSX: AYA; OTCQX: AYASF) shared positive updates from their recent drill exploration at Boumadine in Morocco. The findings from the 2024 - 2025 program indicate a significant extension of the Tizi mineralized trend by 200 meters. This reinforces the presence of high-grade mineralization along the Boumadine Main Trend and also unveils fresh mineralized structures within the Boumadine regional permits.
news.headline: Aya Gold & Silver reports high-grade drill results at Boumadine, extending Tizi Zone by 200 meters, identifying new targets.

news.summary: In Toronto on April 8, 2025, the Board of Directors of AGF Management Limited announced a dividend of 12.5 cents per share for both the Class B Non-Voting shares and the Class A Voting common shares of the company. Shareholders of record on April 14, 2025, will receive this dividend on April 23, 2025.
news.headline: AGF Management Limited declares Q1 2025 dividend of 12.5 cents/share for Class B & Class A, payable on April 23.
Tilray Brands announces Q3 fiscal 2025 financial results with significant numbers.

news.summary: In Toronto on April 8, 2025, AGF Management Limited (AGF) disclosed its financial performance for the initial quarter concluding on February 28, 2025. The Company's stock is listed as TSX: AGF.B.
news.headline: AGF Management Limited (TSX: AGF.B) reports Q1 2025 financial results, ending February 28, 2025 in Toronto.

news.summary: Enthusiast Gaming incorporates U.GG and Luminosity into the Marvel Rivals ecosystem, expanding its NetEase partnership amidst growing worldwide interest. This integration aims to capitalize on the significant engagement numbers seen across the platforms, with a focus on enhancing the user experience and attracting more users to the Marvel Rivals ecosystem.
news.headline: Enthusiast Gaming's U.GG expands analytics platform for Marvel Rivals, capitalizing on NetEase partnership and rising global interest.

news.summary: Algernon Pharmaceuticals Inc., a Canadian pharmaceutical company, has recently been granted a notice of allowance by the European Patent Office for its patent application 19827430.0. This patent is for their lead drug NP-251 (Repirinast), which is being developed for chronic kidney disease. Algernon Pharmaceuticals is currently in the clinical stage of development and is listed on the CSE under the ticker symbol AGN, the Frankfurt stock exchange under AGW0, and the OTCQB under AGNPF.
news.headline: Algernon Pharmaceuticals receives European Patent Office allowance for NP-251 drug for kidney disease.

news.summary: Participants who underwent treatment with Descartes-08 showed sustained deep responses during long-term follow-up after completing just one therapy session. On average, there was a notable 4.8-point decrease in MG-ADL at the 12-month mark.
news.headline: Descartes-08 therapy shows sustained benefits in Myasthenia Gravis trial with 4.8-point reduction in MG-ADL at Month 12.

news.summary: In Hamburg, Germany, on April 8, 2025, Panasonic Avionics introduced Converix, a new application hosting platform poised to revolutionize commercial aviation. This innovative platform promises to enhance non-safety critical services across the entire aircraft.
news.headline: Panasonic Avionics launches Converix, an aircraft-wide hosting solution in Hamburg, Germany on April 8, 2025. #innovation
Koryx Copper shares update on projects in Zambia, announces exploration work program for 2025.

news.summary: Resilience, a San Francisco-based company, announced on April 8, 2025, that they will be offering their cutting-edge cyber risk solutions to clients with revenue exceeding $10 billion. As a top provider in this sector, Resilience aims to cater to a larger market by extending their award-winning services to a wider range of clients.
news.headline: Resilience partners with Accredited Insurance to offer cyber risk solutions for large enterprises with over $10B revenue.

news.summary: In Toronto on April 8, 2025, Forsys Metals Corp. announced their stock exchange listings as TSX: FSY, FSE: F2T, and NSX: FSY. The company, referred to as Forsys, provided this information.
news.headline: Forsys Metals Corp reports successful ore sorting testwork at Norasa, showing positive results. TSX: FSY.

news.summary: BAE Systems, located in Falls Church, Virginia, is well-positioned for expansion in submarine projects thanks to their skilled workforce and capacity. The company has made investments totaling over $260 million in their facilities within the last six years.
news.headline: BAE Systems investing over $260 million in facilities to support submarine manufacturing; ready for growth.

news.summary: Throughout the month of April, Castle will be providing backing for vital educational programs and initiatives to support Esophageal Cancer Awareness.
news.headline: Castle Biosciences boosts Esophageal Cancer awareness by backing educational programs in April.

news.summary: PepsiCo is demonstrating its dedication to the future of football by fueling the enthusiasm of athletes, supporters, and societies worldwide. In an announcement made in Purchase, N.Y., on April 8, 2025, PepsiCo declared that three of its renowned brands – Pepsi, Lay's, and Gatorade – are amplifying their pledges.
news.headline: PepsiCo extends partnership with UEFA women's football through 2030, involving Pepsi, Lay's, and Gatorade.

news.summary: BioStem Technologies has announced that they will be holding a conference call on April 14, 2025, to discuss their financial results for the fourth quarter and full year of 2024. This call will provide investors and analysts with insights into the company's performance during that period. It is an opportunity to learn about their revenue, profits, and overall financial health. The conference call is expected to reveal key figures and milestones achieved by BioStem Technologies in 2024. Investors are encouraged to participate to gain a better understanding of the company's financial standing and future prospects.
news.headline: BioStem Technologies will discuss Q4 and full year 2024 financial results on April 14, 2025 during a conference call.

news.summary: On April 8, 2025, in Bengaluru, India, Zoomcar Holdings, Inc. introduced Zoomcar Vouchers, allowing users to prepay for upcoming trips on its app. The company, listed on Nasdaq under ZCAR, is a prominent platform for self-drive car sharing. This option enables customers to conveniently plan and reserve their travel in advance through the app.
news.headline: Zoomcar introduces prepaid vouchers in India, reaffirms India-first operating model despite tariffs.{/ End}

news.summary: In Tampa, Florida on April 8, 2025, Trace Systems Inc. (Trace), a prominent supplier of tactical communications and integrated satellite infrastructure solutions, has secured the U.S. Army's Project Manager Tactical Network (PM TN) Very Small Aperture Terminal (VSAT) IV contract.
news.headline: Trace Systems wins $373M contract to boost U.S. Army's Tactical Network, enhances VSAT IV capabilities.

news.summary: Axsome Therapeutics, Inc., a biopharmaceutical company specializing in central nervous system disorders, is set to disclose its financial performance for the first quarter of 2025 on May 5, 2025, before the U.S. financial markets open. Following this release, Axsome's management will conduct a conference call at 8:00 a.m. Eastern Time to review the results and deliver a business update. The company trades on the NASDAQ under the ticker symbol AXSM.
news.headline: Axsome Therapeutics (NASDAQ: AXSM) to report Q1 2025 financial results on May 5, with a conference call at 8:00 am ET.

news.summary: In Shanghai on April 08, 2025, ECARX Holdings, Inc. (Nasdaq: ECX), a prominent global mobility tech provider, shared news of the approval by its board of directors for an increase in share repurchase authorization by US$20 million. This update falls in line with the share repurchase program initiated on December 20, 2024. The total repurchase authorization now stands at $40 million, marking a significant rise, and the term of the program has been extended to March 31, 2026.
news.headline: ECARX increases share repurchase program by $20 million, now totaling $40 million, extended to Mar 31, 2026.

news.summary: First Orion, a renowned provider of communication solutions, has unveiled the Protect+ Risk service in NORTH LITTLE ROCK, Arkansas on April 8, 2025. This innovative offering empowers businesses to strategically manage inbound calls, ensuring that only high-quality calls are directed to their agents. This launch signifies First Orion's commitment to assisting businesses in making informed decisions for their operations.
news.headline: First Orion launches Protect+ to safeguard businesses from spam/scam calls, enabling 'only the good calls'.

news.summary: In Newport Beach, California, on April 8, 2025, Ventris Medical, a privately owned company specializing in orthobiologics and tissue regeneration, revealed that the United States Food and Drug Administration has given clearance under the 510(k) pathway for their product Backpack® (Porous Biologic Scaffold, K250556).
news.headline: Ventris Medical receives FDA clearance for Backpack® Bone Graft in disc space, approved with 510(k) for use.

news.summary: A $25,000 grant has been provided to aid in pioneering research on Hepatocellular Carcinoma in Los Angeles. The Blue Faery Award for Excellence in Liver Cancer Research has been bestowed upon a deserving individual or team. This grant aims to support innovative studies related to primary liver cancer.
news.headline: Blue Faery awards $25,000 grant for innovative liver cancer research, recognizing excellence in the field.

news.summary: A recent study spearheaded by Rice University has laid the groundwork for an investigational new drug application with the FDA. The research team, affiliated with the Rice Biotech Launch Pad, successfully created an implantable device coined as a "cytokine factory." This innovative technology serves as the basis for the formation of a new company stemming from RBL LLC. The development has garnered significant attention due to its potential impact on the medical field. The announcement was made in Houston on April 8, 2025.
news.headline: Rice University's cancer-fighting implant for melanoma, pancreatic, and colorectal tumors leads to an FDA investigational new drug application. New company emerging from RBL LLC.

news.summary: Renowned immunologist Dr. Crystal Mackall from Stanford University has been awarded the prestigious IO360º Lifetime Achievement Award for her significant contributions to the field of immuno-oncology. The announcement was made in New York on April 8, 2025, by The Conference Forum during the Immuno-Oncology 360º Summit. Dr. Mackall, who holds the titles MD, FAAP, FAACR, was recognized for her remarkable impact on the field.
news.headline: Dr. Crystal Mackall awarded IO360 Lifetime Achievement for T Cell Therapies impact. Stanford's Mackall recognized at Immuno-Oncology 360 Summit.
